name: Chicken and Sweet Potato Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 3/4-1 inch pieces
2 cups sweet potato, peeled and cubed
1 fresh mild chili (3-4 inches long), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, curry powder, and salt in a heavy-duty resealable plastic bag.
2. Add chicken; seal the bag and shake until the chicken is evenly coated.
3. Heat oil in a 12-inch nonstick skillet over Medium-High heat.
4. Add chicken; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until brown.
5. Stir any remaining flour mixture into apple juice.
6. Stir apple juice, sweet potatoes, and chili into the chicken.
7. Cover and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is no longer pink in the center and the potatoes are tender.
8. Stir in jelly until melted. Garnish with fresh chives, chutney, or chicken peanuts if desired and serve over couscous, if desired.
9. Makes 4 servings.
